name: Code Quality + Refactoring
description: Multi-skill exercise combining code quality review with git best practices
task: Review our code quality and help us refactor this module using git best practices. We want to maintain a clean history and use advanced git features.

coding_challenge.description: Write a linter configuration class that enforces code quality rules. Support enabling/disabling rules, setting thresholds, and generating quality reports. Should handle complexity limits and formatting standards.
